items.title: Homepage hero clarity
items.description: Update the homepage hero small header to "We fix what’s blocking revenue before anything else gets built." and remove all em/en dashes across the page while keeping layout intact.

items.title: Repository hygiene: dev pid + session docs
items.description: Resolve CodeRabbit flags by ignoring runtime .dev/pid.json artifacts and clarifying doc/.plan session handoff guidance so automated reviews pass without noise.

items.title: Internal system conversion pages
items.description: Build internal /audit, /literate, and /intent-driven pages so each system card routes to a focused conversion flow. Update homepage hero CTAs, card CTAs, and remove redundant routing sections to keep paths free of friction.
